TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Yi-nen-ka-ci, title = Yi-nen-ka-ci, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yi-nen-ka-ci} }

S.FORM: Yi-nen-ciya-ci šľäŤÉĹŚėČÁü© kakiliman nilaculin Yi-nen-ka-ci "1867 a mihcaan 6 abylad 11 a demiad katukuh 1925 amihcaan 9 abulad 30 ademiad", u dipun mikingkiway tu tademaw a sipunu'ay, nu lalangawa mikingkiway, nikaudipan nida mikingkiw tu taywa, u taywan naemekan atu yuncumin mikingkiway tu sapanwknwk a tademaw cinida. imahini cinida pasayda tu niyadu'nida yin-yi a kitidaan mikingkiw tu naemekan a tu lalangawan a sapikingkiw, imahini macalolaw ku ci liw-tayn-ku-nan nisulitan nida atu yin-yi-u-yi anilacul. 1949 a mihcaan 6 abulad 6 ademiad, u sitangahay ci yang-in-pin i " pulung a sinbun" nu sakabit "taywan nikaudip" anisulitan, alan ku n iyi-nen a " taywan lalangawan" acuda matucek " taywan sapikinkiw sapicudacacay ba taan" sa. ci yang-se sakamu sa "kapah ninin kukamu sa "taywan mikingkiw tu sayku" Yi-nen-ka-ci a "demiad a adding" nika si masasingay." ." nikaudipanÁĒüŚĻ≥ 1896 amihcaan 11 abulad ci Yi-nen-ka-cinaw hitay nu lu-cin- nu mikuliay ku udip nida kyutayna i taywan, kawaw nida u sakakaay anu mikuwanay tu binawlan. Katukuh sa cinida i taywan, kasenun sa cunida atu ci tin-tay-an-tin "1857 katukuh 1928" masakaput "taywan a tademaw nu masakaputay", malingatu minanam tu kamu nu taywa, nu taluku, kyu mikinsa tu Yincumincu a kamu. 1867 a mihcaan 6 a bulad 11 a demiad " in-cin-3 a mihcaan 5 ay abulad 9 a demiad" Yi-nen-ka-ci lecuhan i dipun yi-yi-heng-tin a niyadu' baluhay a luma' " aydaay nu yin-se-king yin-yi-si timulay a maci" nanu adidi i baku anikuwanan muculcul minanam tu cuda. 1897 a mihcaan 5 ay c bulad katukuh 11 a bulad, mikawaw cubuda makaala tu 192 a demiad nu " sapalangaw tu banzin sa tawya apatungus tu sapicuda mikingsa", imahini nasadipaan nida mamin ku taywan a misaan nida, cinida sa haymaw sa pasasutinaku a mipadadan, pasayda micukaymas tu naumahan a cuda, mipalecad tu nu tin-tay-an-tin, niyaw-ci-lung-cang a tademaw nikinkiwan a hici. ya nikingkiwan nu henisa pacunuden tu nu udip a satakatineng, patahekal tu taywan yuncimin a sapacuyaku a kaput, namakayni i kamu nu binacadan "ukaku nu udip, ulalagawan, nudateng, u kamu nu ngiha, naemekan a pasubana;"lima kina sasakamuen a pasasucukaymas, , u taywan yuncumin u "idaw aca ku malecaday ni kasaupu sa, paadih aca tu wayway nu baat atu capi, suwanisen tu pulung nu cudad adihan ku idang nu baat tu capi" pakayni "luyalul,binacadan, niyadu" a mupili', u taywan yuncumin pala waluen a binacadan tusa idaw ku cacay ku niyadu' " waluay a binacadan sa; tayal,amis,bunung, cu, saysiya, paywan,puyma, tangabulan" mademec ku nu cin a siyhu nu ban sananay," mataay a ban", "maneknekay a ban", hidanida mu ulic. 1898 a mihcaan, ci Yi-nen-ciya-ci "mikingkiw tu banzin" mikisaay, mihapiyu " taywan nu huwan a nipi tadas a kakawaw" 1898ŚĻī4śúą, ". 1900 a mihcaan, kasenun han ku taywan nu malumanay a pikingsa a masakaputay patideng, tucek han ci Yi-nen-ciya-ci malabanti. pinaamihcaan alaw han mamin tu nida ku pikingsa tu nu tademaw a kakawaw kyu idaw ku "ratwan bazin a kakawaw". atu mutiku musilemud tu tusaay a lasubu nu matenesay a banzin a nukuwanan "taywan banzun" itawya mumuku tu baeketay a ziday. 1904 amihcaan 4 abulad, ci Yi-nen-ciya-ci u "taywan banzi" pasay tukiw a daygaku misinsi tu puesu, nika i 1907 a mihcaan pacubelisan. 1906 amihcaan ci Yi-nen-ciya-ci miales tu kawaw nida, taluma i niyadu' nida i yin-yi, sadep sa misulit tu nwemekan misulit ku kawaw nida, imahida mihapiyu tu yi-su a naemeka. 1909 amihcaan, ciYi-nen-ciya-ci mahedek ku "tabakiay a dipu nu cudad musilac -u taywan" 1922 amihcaan "taysiwsabaw cacay a mihcaan" upulung nu mikuwanay patideng tu "taywan a mikuwanay naemekan anikaydaan a wiyunhuy muawaw ci Yi-nen-ciya-cimamisulit tunu cin-day a taywan nu naemekan, wonisa pasayni i taywan nu naemekan macalilaw tabaki a akawaw a "taywan lalangawan a kawaw". 1925 a mihcaan 8 ay a bulad 9 a demiad, i tini i taywan malalid tu imelang mangaleb aca, micumud i sen-kang a ising a paising, tuyda a mihcaan 9 abulad 30 ademiad ci Yi-nen-ciya-ci mapatay, tawya 58 ku mihcaan nida. 1925ŚĻī8śúą9śó•, ,šļęŚĻī58ś≠≤.
S.PHON: ji-n…ôn- ¶ija- ¶i **** kakir~…ĺiman nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺin ji-n…ôn-ka- ¶i "**** a mińß ¶aan * abjr~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad katukuńß **** amińß ¶aan * abur~…ĺad ** ad…ômiad", u dipun mikiŇčkiwaj tu tad…ômaw a sipunu Ē~ °aj, nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawa mikiŇčkiwaj, nikaudipan nida mikiŇčkiw tu tajwa, u tajwan na…ôm…ôkan atu jun ¶umin mikiŇčkiwaj tu sapanwknwk a tad…ômaw ¶inida. imańßini ¶inida pasajda tu nijadu Ē~ °nida jin-ji a kitidaan mikiŇčkiw tu na…ôm…ôkan a tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a sapikiŇčkiw, imańßini ma ¶ar~…ĺor~…ĺaw ku ¶i r~…ĺiw-tajn-ku-nan nisur~…ĺitan nida atu jin-ji-u-ji anir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶aan * abur~…ĺad * ad…ômiad, u sitaŇčańßaj ¶i jaŇč-in-pin i " pur~…ĺuŇč a sinbun" nu sakabit "tajwan nikaudip" anisur~…ĺitan, ar~…ĺan ku n iji-n…ôn a " tajwan r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan" a ¶uda matu ¶…ôk " tajwan sapikinkiw sapi ¶uda ¶a ¶aj ba taan" sa. ¶i jaŇč-s…ô sakamu sa "kapańß ninin kukamu sa "tajwan mikiŇčkiw tu sajku" ji-n…ôn-ka- ¶i a "d…ômiad a addiŇč" nika si masasiŇčaj." ." nikaudipan** **** amińß ¶aan ** abur~…ĺad ¶i ji-n…ôn-ka- ¶inaw ńßitaj nu r~…ĺu- ¶in- nu mikur~…ĺiaj ku udip nida kjutajna i tajwan, kawaw nida u sakakaaj anu mikuwanaj tu binawr~…ĺan. katukuńß sa ¶inida i tajwan, kas…ônun sa ¶unida atu ¶i tin-taj-an-tin "**** katukuńß ****" masakaput "tajwan a tad…ômaw nu masakaputaj", mar~…ĺiŇčatu minanam tu kamu nu tajwa, nu tar~…ĺuku, kju mikinsa tu jin ¶umin ¶u a kamu. **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad " in- ¶in-* a mińß ¶aan * aj abur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad" ji-n…ôn-ka- ¶i r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i dipun ji-ji-ńß…ôŇč-tin a nijadu Ē~ ° bar~…ĺuńßaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° " ajdaaj nu jin-s…ô-kiŇč jin-ji-si timur~…ĺaj a ma ¶i" nanu adidi i baku anikuwanan mu ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ minanam tu ¶uda. **** a mińß ¶aan * aj ¶ bur~…ĺad katukuńß ** a bur~…ĺad, mikawaw ¶ubuda makaar~…ĺa tu *** a d…ômiad nu " sapar~…ĺaŇčaw tu banzin sa tawja apatuŇčus tu sapi ¶uda mikiŇčsa", imańßini nasadipaan nida mamin ku tajwan a misaan nida, ¶inida sa ńßajmaw sa pasasutinaku a mipadadan, pasajda mi ¶ukajmas tu naumańßan a ¶uda, mipar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu nu tin-taj-an-tin, nijaw- ¶i-r~…ĺuŇč- ¶aŇč a tad…ômaw nikinkiwan a ńßi ¶i. ja nikiŇčkiwan nu ńß…ônisa pa ¶unud…ôn tu nu udip a satakatin…ôŇč, patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu tajwan jun ¶imin a sapa ¶ujaku a kaput, namakajni i kamu nu bina ¶adan "ukaku nu udip, ur~…ĺar~…ĺagawan, nudat…ôŇč, u kamu nu Ňčińßa, na…ôm…ôkan a pasubana;"r~…ĺima kina sasakamu…ôn a pasasu ¶ukajmas, , u tajwan jun ¶umin u "idaw a ¶a ku mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj ni kasaupu sa, paadińß a ¶a tu wajwaj nu baat atu ¶api, suwanis…ôn tu pur~…ĺuŇč nu ¶udad adińßan ku idaŇč nu baat tu ¶api" pakajni "r~…ĺujar~…ĺur~…ĺ,bina ¶adan, nijadu" a mupir~…ĺi Ē~ °, u tajwan jun ¶umin par~…ĺa war~…ĺu…ôn a bina ¶adan tusa idaw ku ¶a ¶aj ku nijadu Ē~ ° " war~…ĺuaj a bina ¶adan sa; tajar~…ĺ,amis,bunuŇč, ¶u, sajsija, pajwan,pujma, taŇčabur~…ĺan" mad…ôm…ô ¶ ku nu ¶in a sijńßu nu ban sananaj," mataaj a ban", "man…ôkn…ôkaj a ban", ńßidanida mu ur~…ĺi ¶. **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i ji-n…ôn- ¶ija- ¶i "mikiŇčkiw tu banzin" mikisaaj, mińßapiju " tajwan nu ńßuwan a nipi tadas a kakawaw" *******, ". **** a mińß ¶aan, kas…ônun ńßan ku tajwan nu mar~…ĺumanaj a pikiŇčsa a masakaputaj patid…ôŇč, tu ¶…ôk ńßan ¶i ji-n…ôn- ¶ija- ¶i mar~…ĺabanti. pinaamińß ¶aan ar~…ĺaw ńßan mamin tu nida ku pikiŇčsa tu nu tad…ômaw a kakawaw kju idaw ku "ratwan bazin a kakawaw". atu mutiku musir~…ĺ…ômud tu tusaaj a r~…ĺasubu nu mat…ôn…ôsaj a banzin a nukuwanan "tajwan banzun" itawja mumuku tu ba…ôk…ôtaj a zidaj. **** amińß ¶aan * abur~…ĺad, ¶i ji-n…ôn- ¶ija- ¶i u "tajwan banzi" pasaj tukiw a dajgaku misinsi tu pu…ôsu, nika i **** a mińß ¶aan pa ¶ub…ôr~…ĺisan. **** amińß ¶aan ¶i ji-n…ôn- ¶ija- ¶i miar~…ĺ…ôs tu kawaw nida, tar~…ĺuma i nijadu Ē~ ° nida i jin-ji, sad…ôp sa misur~…ĺit tu nw…ôm…ôkan misur~…ĺit ku kawaw nida, imańßida mińßapiju tu ji-su a na…ôm…ôka. **** amińß ¶aan, ¶iji-n…ôn- ¶ija- ¶i mańß…ôd…ôk ku "tabakiaj a dipu nu ¶udad musir~…ĺa ¶ -u tajwan" **** amińß ¶aan "tajsiwsabaw ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan" upur~…ĺuŇč nu mikuwanaj patid…ôŇč tu "tajwan a mikuwanaj na…ôm…ôkan anikajdaan a wijunńßuj muawaw ¶i ji-n…ôn- ¶ija- ¶imamisur~…ĺit tunu ¶in-daj a tajwan nu na…ôm…ôkan, wonisa pasajni i tajwan nu na…ôm…ôkan ma ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw tabaki a akawaw a "tajwan r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a kawaw". **** a mińß ¶aan * aj a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad, i tini i tajwan mar~…ĺar~…ĺid tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb a ¶a, mi ¶umud i s…ôn-kaŇč a isiŇč a paisiŇč, tujda a mińß ¶aan * abur~…ĺad ** ad…ômiad ¶i ji-n…ôn- ¶ija- ¶i mapataj, tawja ** ku mińß ¶aan nida. *********, ,*****.
S.FORM: Yi-nen-ciya-ci šľäŤÉĹŚėČÁü© kakiliman nilaculin Yi-nen-ka-ci "1867 a mihcaan 6 abylad 11 a demiad katukuh 1925 amihcaan 9 abulad 30 ademiad", u dipun mikingkiway tu tademaw a sipunu'ay, nu lalangawa mikingkiway, nikaudipan nida mikingkiw tu taywa, u taywan naemekan atu yuncumin mikingkiway tu sapanwknwk a tademaw cinida. imahini cinida pasayda tu niyadu'nida yin-yi a kitidaan mikingkiw tu naemekan a tu lalangawan a sapikingkiw, imahini macalolaw ku ci liw-tayn-ku-nan nisulitan nida atu yin-yi-u-yi anilacul. 1949 a mihcaan 6 abulad 6 ademiad, u sitangahay ci yang-in-pin i " pulung a sinbun" nu sakabit "taywan nikaudip" anisulitan, alan ku n iyi-nen a " taywan lalangawan" acuda matucek " taywan sapikinkiw sapicudacacay ba taan" sa. ci yang-se sakamu sa "kapah ninin kukamu sa "taywan mikingkiw tu sayku" Yi-nen-ka-ci a "demiad a adding" nika si masasingay." ." nikaudipanÁĒüŚĻ≥ 1896 amihcaan 11 abulad ci Yi-nen-ka-cinaw hitay nu lu-cin- nu mikuliay ku udip nida kyutayna i taywan, kawaw nida u sakakaay anu mikuwanay tu binawlan. Katukuh sa cinida i taywan, kasenun sa cunida atu ci tin-tay-an-tin "1857 katukuh 1928" masakaput "taywan a tademaw nu masakaputay", malingatu minanam tu kamu nu taywa, nu taluku, kyu mikinsa tu Yincumincu a kamu. 1867 a mihcaan 6 a bulad 11 a demiad " in-cin-3 a mihcaan 5 ay abulad 9 a demiad" Yi-nen-ka-ci lecuhan i dipun yi-yi-heng-tin a niyadu' baluhay a luma' " aydaay nu yin-se-king yin-yi-si timulay a maci" nanu adidi i baku anikuwanan muculcul minanam tu cuda. 1897 a mihcaan 5 ay c bulad katukuh 11 a bulad, mikawaw cubuda makaala tu 192 a demiad nu " sapalangaw tu banzin sa tawya apatungus tu sapicuda mikingsa", imahini nasadipaan nida mamin ku taywan a misaan nida, cinida sa haymaw sa pasasutinaku a mipadadan, pasayda micukaymas tu naumahan a cuda, mipalecad tu nu tin-tay-an-tin, niyaw-ci-lung-cang a tademaw nikinkiwan a hici. ya nikingkiwan nu henisa pacunuden tu nu udip a satakatineng, patahekal tu taywan yuncimin a sapacuyaku a kaput, namakayni i kamu nu binacadan "ukaku nu udip, ulalagawan, nudateng, u kamu nu ngiha, naemekan a pasubana;"lima kina sasakamuen a pasasucukaymas, , u taywan yuncumin u "idaw aca ku malecaday ni kasaupu sa, paadih aca tu wayway nu baat atu capi, suwanisen tu pulung nu cudad adihan ku idang nu baat tu capi" pakayni "luyalul,binacadan, niyadu" a mupili', u taywan yuncumin pala waluen a binacadan tusa idaw ku cacay ku niyadu' " waluay a binacadan sa; tayal,amis,bunung, cu, saysiya, paywan,puyma, tangabulan" mademec ku nu cin a siyhu nu ban sananay," mataay a ban", "maneknekay a ban", hidanida mu ulic. 1898 a mihcaan, ci Yi-nen-ciya-ci "mikingkiw tu banzin" mikisaay, mihapiyu " taywan nu huwan a nipi tadas a kakawaw" 1898ŚĻī4śúą, ". 1900 a mihcaan, kasenun han ku taywan nu malumanay a pikingsa a masakaputay patideng, tucek han ci Yi-nen-ciya-ci malabanti. pinaamihcaan alaw han mamin tu nida ku pikingsa tu nu tademaw a kakawaw kyu idaw ku "ratwan bazin a kakawaw". atu mutiku musilemud tu tusaay a lasubu nu matenesay a banzin a nukuwanan "taywan banzun" itawya mumuku tu baeketay a ziday. 1904 amihcaan 4 abulad, ci Yi-nen-ciya-ci u "taywan banzi" pasay tukiw a daygaku misinsi tu puesu, nika i 1907 a mihcaan pacubelisan. 1906 amihcaan ci Yi-nen-ciya-ci miales tu kawaw nida, taluma i niyadu' nida i yin-yi, sadep sa misulit tu nwemekan misulit ku kawaw nida, imahida mihapiyu tu yi-su a naemeka. 1909 amihcaan, ciYi-nen-ciya-ci mahedek ku "tabakiay a dipu nu cudad musilac -u taywan" 1922 amihcaan "taysiwsabaw cacay a mihcaan" upulung nu mikuwanay patideng tu "taywan a mikuwanay naemekan anikaydaan a wiyunhuy muawaw ci Yi-nen-ciya-cimamisulit tunu cin-day a taywan nu naemekan, wonisa pasayni i taywan nu naemekan macalilaw tabaki a akawaw a "taywan lalangawan a kawaw". 1925 a mihcaan 8 ay a bulad 9 a demiad, i tini i taywan malalid tu imelang mangaleb aca, micumud i sen-kang a ising a paising, tuyda a mihcaan 9 abulad 30 ademiad ci Yi-nen-ciya-ci mapatay, tawya 58 ku mihcaan nida. 1925ŚĻī8śúą9śó•, ,šļęŚĻī58ś≠≤.

tad…ômaw a sipunu Ē~ °aj, nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawa mikiŇčkiwaj, nikaudipan nida mikiŇčkiw tu tajwa, u tajwan na…ôm…ôkan atu jun ¶umin mikiŇčkiwaj tu sapanwknwk a tad…ômaw ¶inida. imańßini ¶inida pasajda tu ¶ija- ¶i "mikiŇčkiw tu banzin" mikisaaj, mińßapiju " tajwan nu ńßuwan a nipi tadas a kakawaw" *******, ". **** a mińß ¶aan, kas…ônun ńßan ku tajwan nu mar~…ĺumanaj a pikiŇčsa a masakaputaj patid…ôŇč, tu ¶…ôk ńßan ¶i ji-n…ôn- ¶ija- ¶i mar~…ĺabanti. pinaamińß ¶aan ar~…ĺaw ńßan mamin tu nida ku pikiŇčsa tu nu tad…ômaw a kakawaw kju idaw ku "ratwan bazin a kakawaw". atu mutiku musir~…ĺ…ômud tu tusaaj a r~…ĺasubu nu mat…ôn…ôsaj a banzin a nukuwanan "tajwan banzun" itawja mumuku tu ba…ôk…ôtaj a zidaj. **** amińß ¶aan * abur~…ĺad, ¶i ji-n…ôn- ¶ija- ¶i u "tajwan banzi" pasaj tukiw a dajgaku misinsi tu pu…ôsu, nika i **** a mińß ¶aan pa ¶ub…ôr~…ĺisan. **** amińß ¶aan ¶i ji-n…ôn- ¶ija- ¶i miar~…ĺ…ôs tu kawaw nida, tar~…ĺuma i nijadu Ē~ ° nida i jin-ji, sad…ôp sa misur~…ĺit tu nw…ôm…ôkan misur~…ĺit ku kawaw nida, imańßida mińßapiju tu ji-su a na…ôm…ôka. **** amińß ¶aan, ¶iji-n…ôn- ¶ija- ¶i mańß…ôd…ôk ku "tabakiaj a dipu nu ¶udad musir~…ĺa ¶ -u tajwan" **** amińß ¶aan "tajsiwsabaw ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan" upur~…ĺuŇč nu mikuwanaj patid…ôŇč tu "tajwan a mikuwanaj na…ôm…ôkan anikajdaan a wijunńßuj muawaw ¶i ji-n…ôn- ¶ija- ¶imamisur~…ĺit tunu ¶in-daj a tajwan nu na…ôm…ôkan, wonisa pasajni i tajwan nu na…ôm…ôkan ma ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw tabaki a akawaw a "tajwan r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a kawaw". **** a mińß ¶aan * aj a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad, i tini i tajwan mar~…ĺar~…ĺid tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb a ¶a, mi ¶umud i s…ôn-kaŇč a isiŇč a paisiŇč, tujda a mińß ¶aan * abur~…ĺad ** ad…ômiad ¶i ji-n…ôn- ¶ija- ¶i mapataj, tawja ** ku mińß ¶aan nida. *********, ,*****.
